#  Delete a Response to an RFI 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Responses can only be deleted from 'Open' RFIs.


#####  Warning
When you delete a response to an RFI, it will be permanently deleted from Procore. Deleted responses are not recoverable.
##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. Click the **Items** tab.
  3. Click **View** next to the RFI with the response that you want to delete.
  4. Scroll to the **Responses** card.
  5. Click the ![Icon Delete Trash5](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/93567ecfccdf989e10555267e3606c44/70c3b87dea839e5a368bf37d9a08479a/icon-delete-trash5.png?fm=webp&h=17) icon next to the response you want to delete.
  6. In the **Delete this response?** window, click **Delete**.


## See Also
  * [What is the RFI Manager role?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-rfi-manager-role)
  * [Add Assignees to an RFI as an Assignee on an RFI](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/add-assignees-to-an-rfi-as-an-assignee-on-an-rfi)
  * [Delete an RFI](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/delete-an-rfi)
title: Delete a Response to an RFI
description: How to permanently delete a response to an RFI.
